messages.message: Fast refresh only works when a file only exports components. Use a new file to share constants or functions between components.
React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'fetchCourses'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [fetchCourses, filters]

messages.message: 'navigate' is assigned a value but never used. Allowed unused vars must match /^[A-Z_]/u.
